Who I Am

Faith
Elusogbon

I got into automation because I kept seeing businesses — good businesses — drowning in repetitive manual work that software could handle in seconds.

I build with n8n, Airtable, GoHighLevel, Make, Zapier, Softr, and ElevenLabs. My projects have ranged from AI voice agents for restaurants to full CRM systems for real estate firms — each one built to solve a specific problem, not just to look impressive.

I was the #1 student across n8n, Make, and GoHighLevel at KOKA Academy. I hold a BSc in Estate Management from Obafemi Awolowo University — which taught me how to think about systems long before I started building them in code.

How It Goes

Working
With Me

03
1

Discovery Call

We map your current operations, identify bottlenecks, and define the exact outcomes you need — no scope creep, no vague deliverables.

2

System Design

I architect the full workflow before a single node is built — data models, integration points, error handling, and scalability baked in from day one.

3

Build & Test

Rapid iteration with live testing against real data. Every edge case accounted for before handoff — no surprises at 2am.

4

Launch & Support

Clean documentation, team training, and ongoing support so your team owns the system — and can grow it without me.
